basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 65 Assistant Grade, UDC Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC), Government of Mizoram
basic_details.department: Various Departments of Government of Mizoram
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC), Government of Mizoram has published the Assistant Grade & Upper Division Clerk (UDC) Notification 2026 on 12 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 65 Assistant Grade and UDC positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years (relaxation as per category rules) and holding a Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University with required computer proficiency and Mizo language knowledge are eligible to apply online at mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in. The application process will be active from 12 May 2026 to 19 June 2026, and candidates can

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified on official website

application_fee.details: Application fee details are as per MPSC norms. Persons with Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from payment of application fee. Other candidates must check the official portal for exact fee structure.

age_limit.age_relaxation: Up to 5 years (or as per Government rules)
age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is available for SC/ST candidates and other reserved categories as per Government of Mizoram rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification, computer proficiency, Mizo language proficiency, and age limit as on the crucial date (01-01-2026). Government servants must apply through proper channel. | Educational Qualification: | Additional Mandatory Requirements: | Computer Proficiency: As prescribed by Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' & 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Candidates must possess Computer Proficiency Certificate. Mizo Language Proficiency: Mandatory requirement. However, exemption is granted to candidates who have studied Mizo up to HSLC (Class-X) or above.

vacancy_details.Post & Department: UDC under Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation
UDC under Social Welfare, Women & Child Development

salary_details.pay_scale: Assistant Grade: Level-7 | UDC: Level-6 (Pay Matrix 7th CPC)
salary_details.details: The selected candidates will be appointed in Assistant Grade and UDC posts with pay scale at Level-7 and Level-6 respectively of the Pay Matrix as per 7th Central Pay Commission adopted by Government of Mizoram. The employees will also be entitled to allowances as per Government rules. | Note: Some posts are contractual in nature as mentioned in the vacancy details. Pay and allowances will be as per Government of Mizoram rules.

selection_process: The selection process for MPSC Assistant & UDC Recruitment 2026 consists of Written Examination
and Mizo Language Proficiency Test (wherever applicable). The syllabus for the written examination is available on the official MPSC website.

Written Examination: Candidates will be required to appear for a written examination based on the prescribed syllabus available on the official MPSC website Document Verification: Candidates qualifying in the written examination will be called for document verification Mizo Language Proficiency Test: Wherever applicable (exemption for candidates who studied Mizo up to HSLC or above)
Detailed syllabus for Written Examination is available on the official MPSC website
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Mizoram Public Service Commission online portal (https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/). No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 12-05-2026 to 19-06-2026 (up to 4:00 PM). New users must complete one-time registration before 19-06-2026 (4:00 PM).
Steps to Apply Online:
Step 1: Visit MPSC Online Portal - Go to https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/
Step 2: One-Time Registration (for New Users) - If you are a new user, complete one-time registration on the portal before 19-06-2026 (4:00 PM). Existing users can directly login.
Step 3: Login to Portal - Login using your registered credentials
Step 4: Fill Application Form - Fill the online application form carefully with all required details and choose post preferences (post preference option once exercised is final)
Step 5: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of all required documents as per specifications
Step 6: Pay Application Fee - Pay application fee online (if applicable) through available payment modes. PwBD candidates are exempted from fee payment.
Step 7: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
Step 8: Verify Submission - Verify that your application status shows "Submitted" after payment. Take printout of submitted application for future reference.
Documents to be Uploaded with Online Application:
HSLC (Class 10th) Marksheet & Certificate
Higher Secondary (Class 12th) Marksheet & Certificate
Bachelor's Degree Certificate and mark sheets (all semesters/years)
Computer Proficiency Certificate (as per Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' & 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023)
Mizo Language Proficiency Certificate (if applicable - exemption for those who studied Mizo up to HSLC or above)
Age Proof Certificate (10th certificate/Birth certificate)
PwBD Certificate issued by competent authority (if claiming PwBD reservation)
Ex-Servicemen Certificate (if claiming Ex-Servicemen reservation)
SC/ST certificate (if applicable)
Any other relevant documents as mentioned in the notification
Apply Online at: https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/
important_instructions: Application must be submitted online only through MPSC online portal Last date for online application: 19-06-2026 (up to 4:00 PM) Last date for one-time registration (new users): 19-06-2026 (4:00 PM) Age calculated as on 01-01-2026: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 35 years Age relaxation: Up to 5 years for SC/ST or as per Government rules Educational Qualification: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University Computer Proficiency Certificate mandatory as per Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' & 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023 Mizo Language Proficiency mandatory (exemption for candidates who studied Mizo up to HSLC or above) Applicants must indicate post preference at the time of application - option once exercised is final Application fee: PwBD candidates exempted; others as per MPSC norms Candidates must ensure their application is successfully submitted after payment Verify that application status shows "Submitted" after fee payment Government servants should apply through proper channel Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification Selection through: Written Examination + Document Verification + Mizo Language Proficiency Test (wherever applicable) Syllabus for written examination available on official MPSC website All updates will be published only on the MPSC official website Candidates are advised to visit the official website regularly for updates regarding admit card, examination schedule, and results

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are announced in MPSC Assistant UDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Mizoram PSC has announced 65 vacancies including 30 Assistant Grade and 35 UDC posts across various Government of Mizoram departments.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for MPSC Assistant Grade 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online applications is 19 June 2026 (up to 4:00 PM) through the MPSC online portal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for MPSC Assistant & UDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor's degree from a recognized university, computer proficiency certificate, and Mizo language proficiency (exemption if studied Mizo up to Class-X).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MPSC Assistant UDC Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Age limit is 18 to 35 years as on 01 January 2026, with 5 years relaxation for SC/ST candidates as per Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for MPSC Assistant Grade posts?
faq.answer: Assistant Grade: Level-7 Pay Matrix | UDC: Level-6 Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC adopted by Government of Mizoram.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MPSC Assistant & UDC 2026?
faq.answer: Selection includes Written Examination, Document Verification, and Mizo Language Proficiency Test (wherever applicable).

faq.question: Q7. Is there application fee for MPSC Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: PwBD candidates are exempted. Other candidates must pay as per MPSC norms (check official portal for exact fee structure).

faq.question: Q8. Which departments have MPSC UDC vacancies 2026?
faq.answer: UDC vacancies are available in departments like General Administration, FCS&CA, H&TE, Urban Development, Cooperation, PHE, Sports, Art & Culture, Social Welfare, Home, AH&V, and State Election Commission.
